zh.Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, France: 法國阿爾薩斯豪吉爾艾吉海姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich I. von Dagsburg於大約1018年出生在法國阿爾薩斯豪吉爾艾吉海姆時，他的父親Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburg29歲，母親Mathilde25歲。他於大約1049年與Mädchen von Moha結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1065年6月28日在他的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.Luxemburg, Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀爾左圖姆 盧森堡
zh-hans.Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, France: 法国阿爾薩斯豪吉爾艾吉海姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich I. von Dagsburg于大约1018年出生在法国阿爾薩斯豪吉爾艾吉海姆时，他的父亲Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburg29岁，母亲Mathilde25岁。他于大约1049年与Mädchen von Moha结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1065年6月28日在他的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich I. von Dagsburg was born about 1018, in Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburg, was 29 and his mother, Mathilde, was 25. He married Mädchen von Moha about 1049. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 28 June 1065, in his hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich I. von Dagsburg est né environ 1018, à Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburg, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mathilde, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mädchen von Moha environ 1049. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 28 juin 1065, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich I. von Dagsburg um 1018 in Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburg 29 und seine Mutter Mathilde 25. Er hat um 1049 Mädchen von Moha geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 28. Juni 1065 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I. von Dagsburg è nato il circa 1018 nel Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburg, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mädchen von Moha circa 1049. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 28 giugno 1065, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, France: フランスアルサスハウト-ルヒンエグイシェイム
ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich I. von Dagsburgが約1018年にフランスアルサスハウト-ルヒンエグイシェイムで生まれた時，父Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburgは29歳，母Mathildeは25歳であった。約1049年にMädchen von Mohaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1065年6月28日に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich I. von Dagsburg(이)가 대략 1018년 프랑스 알사스 하트-히 길셰임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburg(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1049년 Mädchen von Moha(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1065년 6월 28일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I. von Dagsburg nasceu aproximadamente 1018, em Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburg, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mädchen von Moha aproximadamente 1049. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 28 de junho de 1065, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich I. von Dagsburg родился около 1018 г. в местности эгуишим, хаут-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburg было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mädchen von Moha около 1049 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 28 июня 1065 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich I. von Dagsburg nació aproximadamente 1018, en Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Hugo V. Graf von Dagsburg, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mathilde, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mädchen von Moha aproximadamente 1049. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 28 de junio de 1065, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
